basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate-I (RA-I) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent in Computer Science/Mathematics and Computing, ME/M.Tech with three years research/teaching/design/development experience and one SCI journal paper
qualification.details: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree in Computer Science/Mathematics and Computing; candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis and are awaiting viva/award of degree are also eligible to apply. OR three years of research, teaching, design, and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in an SCI journal in theoretical computer science and related fields, as per ANRF/DST RA norms.

salary_details.details: Rs. 58,000/- per month + 20% HRA (Rs. 11,600/- per month); total Rs. 69,600/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree in Computer Science/Mathematics and Computing; candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis and are awaiting viva/award of degree are also eligible to apply. OR three years of research, teaching, design, and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in an SCI journal in theoretical computer science and related fields, as per ANRF/DST RA norms.

IIT Indore Research Associate-I (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate-I (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Research Associate-I (RA-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree in Computer Science/Mathematics and Computing, or have three years of relevant research experience after ME/M.Tech with a published SCI journal paper.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, plus 20% HRA (Rs. 11,600/-), totaling Rs. 69,600/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification was released on 22 June 2026, and the last date for applications is 05 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can download it from there.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Indore.
